meaning: vt.刺穿,刺破,穿透,突破,深深感动
examples: They failed to pierce the Liverpool defence.
Testud lost in straight sets to countrywoman Mary Pierce.
A tap on the door interrupted him and Sally Pierce came in.
Elizabeth Pierce, an analyst at Roth Capital Partners, is convinced that Urban will continue its winning ways.
About the guest blogger: Melissa Pierce is the Founder of Chicago Women Developers.
